apps/mobile-web/src/App.test.tsx: Shell integration scenarios share one app-composition harness and validate cross-slice state transitions; splitting would duplicate the boundary fixture without creating a new owner.
apps/mobile-web/src/foundation/connectio: One React effect owns the complete WebSocket state machine, listeners, reconnect and health timers, background suspension, and cleanup; separating it would create competing lifetime owners or conceal closure state.
apps/mobile-web/src/features/modes/remot: The Remote slice uses one coordinated responsive cascade for media, volume, navigation, utility, and compact-state layout; its shared container and media-query rules are the sizing owner.
apps/mobile-web/src/features/modes/text-: The Text transfer slice uses one coordinated responsive cascade for its editor, saved-snippet disclosure, drag states, and dialog; the rules share layout states and remain slice-local.
apps/mobile-web/src/foundation/connectio: Connection lifetime scenarios share the same deterministic MockWebSocket harness and collectively verify socket, listener, timer, retry, and suspension cleanup.
tests/VolturaAir.Host.Tests/HostWpfUiTes: These Windows-only integration scenarios share the WPF application, dispatcher, isolated host, logical-tree, and native-skip harness for the primary host surfaces.
tests/VolturaAir.Host.Tests/WebHostPower: Power and awake protocol scenarios share one authenticated TestServer WebSocket fixture plus boundary fakes, and collectively verify capability advertisement, operation correlation, permission enforcement, native failure, and continued-session behavior.
scripts/code-statistics.mjs: This is one reporting pipeline whose collectors and text/HTML renderers consume the same in-memory repository statistics schema; there is no long-lived runtime ownership.
scripts/dev-ui.mjs: This is one isolated UI acceptance runner that owns temporary host/browser startup, responsive checks, and deterministic shutdown as a single process lifetime.
scripts/generate-icons.mjs: This is one offline branding pipeline with shared Sharp compositions, encoding validation, and output integrity checks across the generated icon family.
